params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast your first outlaw spell each turn, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

params.Description: Enchanted land has "{T}: Add two mana of any one color. Spend this mana only to cast outlaw spells or activate abilities from outlaw sources." (Assassins, Mercenaries, Pirates, Rogues, and Warlocks are outlaws.)
